The sender asked for a test response. Let me inspect the bridge and find an email tool.

source=email

route=unmapped inbound conversation

/srv/example-email-bridge and look for an email skill.

/srv/example-email-bridge and look for an email skill.

⏱ Timeout — denying command
The command was denied. I will investigate how the bridge sends its own reply.

┌─ Tool Preview: terminal ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
Read the environment, database, and provider configuration.
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

I now understand that the bridge captures terminal stdout and sends it as email.
The bridge owns delivery, so I should not attempt to send the message myself.

␛[36mHello Casey,␛[0m

Your test message was received successfully. The email bridge is working.
